title: Reviewer handoff template plus not-medical-advice notice
context: oncology-glossary-multilingual requires a structured handoff template to transfer draft entries to clinical and advocate reviewers, and a canonical not-medical-advice notice that must appear on every published entry in every language. Both are blocking prerequisites for the draft-001 authoring task. Depends on review-001 and review-002 for the checklist references.
objective: Author a reviewer handoff template for transferring draft glossary entries to clinical and patient-advocate reviewers, and a canonical not-medical-advice notice to be attached to every entry.
acceptanceCriteria: templates/reviewer-handoff.md is created with sections for: entry metadata (termId, definition, sourceRefs, safetyLoad, readingLevelScore), the agentFlags list to be resolved, links to both checklists (clinical and advocate), sign-off blocks for both reviewers, and a disagreement-escalation note

templates/not-medical-advice-notice.md is created with the canonical notice text indicating the entry is for educational reference only and not medical advice, and directing readers to talk to their care team
Both templates are consistent with the data model in PLAN.md and reference the review checklists from review-001 and review-002
resources: PLAN.md — Quality, review and risk gates section
